alter table __BSD_KundenExtension
add IsArchived bit

alter table __BSD_KundenExtension
add ArchiveUserId int



alter table __BSD_KundenExtension
add ArchiveTime  datetime

******************

alter table __BSD_LieferantenExtension
add IsArchived bit

alter table __BSD_LieferantenExtension
add ArchiveUserId int



alter table __BSD_LieferantenExtension
add ArchiveTime  datetime
